message:
🐛 Fix sidebar light mode theme not being honored (#721)

* 🐛 Fix sidebar light mode theme not being honored

- Replace inline styles with Tailwind dark: classes for proper theme switching
- Use text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 instead of hardcoded colors
- Add explicit CSS overrides for custom sidebar in globals.css
- Remove var(--foreground) inline styles in favor of Tailwind classes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Move edit page link to top right as pencil icon

- Add 'icon' variant to EditPageLink component
- Place edit icon in top right of page header
- Remove edit link from bottom of page (replaced by icon at top)
- Icon shows tooltip on hover with full text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🧹 Remove redundant CSS overrides per Copilot review

The explicit !important overrides are no longer needed since
components now use Tailwind dark: classes directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Use CSS variable for sidebar background color

Use var(--background) which properly switches between
#ffffff (light) and #0a0a0a (dark) based on theme.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Use CSS variable for text colors in sidebar

Use var(--foreground) for text colors which properly switches
between dark text (light mode) and light text (dark mode).

Tailwind dark: classes weren't working correctly, so using
CSS variables ensures consistent theme behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Use Tailwind important modifier for text colors

Add ! prefix to text color classes to ensure they override
any conflicting styles. Using softer gray-700/gray-200 colors
instead of pure black/white.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix sidebar light mode - use inline styles for theme-aware colors

Switch from Tailwind dark: classes to inline styles with useTheme hook
for reliable theme-aware colors in sidebar and related projects.

- DocsSidebar: Add useTheme hook, apply textColor via inline styles
- RelatedProjects: Update all buttons/links to use inline style colors
- Use computed isDark boolean for consistent theme detection

This fixes text visibility in light mode since Tailwind dark: classes
were not working correctly in this project.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
